ddls:
CREATE TABLE "items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item */,
  "item_weight" REAL /* Weight of the item */,
  "item_fat_content" TEXT /* Fat content of the item */,
  "item_visibility" REAL /* Visibility score of the item within the store */,
  "item_type" TEXT /* Type of the item (e.g., Dairy, Soft Drinks, Meat, Fruits and Vegetables, Household) */,
  "item_mrp" REAL /* Maximum Retail Price of the item */,
  "item_outlet_sales" REAL /* Sales of the item at the outlet */,
  "item_brand" TEXT /* Brand of the item */,
  "item_supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier */,
  "item_expiry_date" TEXT /* Expiry date of the item */,
  "item_reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the item */,
  "item_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the item */,
  "item_category" TEXT /* Category of the item (subcategories within types) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_items_item_type FOREIGN KEY ("item_type") REFERENCES item_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "outlets" (
  "outlet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each outlet */,
  "outlet_establishment_year" INTEGER /* Year the outlet was established */,
  "outlet_size" TEXT /* Size of the outlet (e.g., Medium, High, None) */,
  "outlet_location_type" TEXT /* Location type of the outlet (e.g., Tier 1, Tier 3) */,
  "outlet_type" TEXT /* Type of the outlet (e.g., Supermarket Type1, Supermarket Type2, Grocery Store) */,
  "outlet_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager for the outlet */,
  "outlet_address" TEXT /* Physical address of the outlet */,
  "outlet_contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the outlet */,
  "outlet_email" TEXT /* Email address of the outlet */,
  "outlet_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the outlet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outlet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_outlets_outlet_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("outlet_manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item sold */,
  "outlet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the outlet where the sale occurred */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "sale_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item sold */,
  "sale_price" REAL /* Price at which the item was sold */,
  "sale_discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the sale */,
  "sale_tax" REAL /* Tax amount for the sale */,
  "sale_profit_margin" REAL /* Profit margin for the sale */,
  "sale_promotion_id" INTEGER /* ID of the promotion applied to the sale */,
  "sale_channel" TEXT /* Channel through which the sale was made (e.g., in-store, online) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_outlet_id FOREIGN KEY ("outlet_id") REFERENCES outlets ("outlet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the item type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the item type */,
  "type_parent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent type */,
  "type_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the item type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., manager, sales representative, inventory clerk) */,
  "user_department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "user_position" TEXT /* Position of the user within the department */,
  "user_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "access_user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (e.g., browser, device) used for access */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
